title: Section 0｜Basic Info
01 What is your full legal name?
02 年级 / Current Grade
03 学校名称  / School Name
04 学校类型 / School  Type
05 邮箱 / Email Address
06  What is your preferred messaging platform?
Section 1｜Academic Direction（学术与申请方向）

1.1 你目前最感兴趣/考虑的申请方向是？（可多选）
What academic fields are you currently interested in? (Select all that apply)

1.2 你目前是否有考虑中的长期方向？（如 pre-med、pre-law 等）如果有，请具体说明；如果暂时还不确定，也可以填写“暂不确定”。  
Do you currently have a long-term direction in mind? (e.g., pre-med, pre-law, etc.) If yes, please specify. If not, you may write “Not sure yet.”
Section 2｜Experience Snapshot（过往经历快照）

2.1 你觉得目前最能代表你的 2–3 个经历是？
Which experiences best represent you?

2.2 你更擅长哪类事情？（选 1–2 个最贴近的）
What are your strengths?

2.3 在你选的这些方面中，哪一个你投入时间最多？你是怎么投入的？
Among the strengths you selected, which one have you invested the most time in, and how?
Section 3｜Interests & Self-Expression（兴趣与表达方式）

3.1 你在校外/校内长期投入时间的兴趣是？
What activities or interests have you consistently invested time in?

3.2 如果让你选一种“你更舒服的表达方式”，你会选哪种？（可多选）
Which form of expression feels most natural to you? (Select all that apply)

3.3 当你对一个问题产生兴趣时，你通常会如何开始入手？（可多选）
When you are interested in a topic, how do you usually start engaging with it? (Select all that apply)
Section 4｜Community & Resources（社区与现有资源）

4.1 你目前所处的“社区”包括哪些？（可多选）
Which communities are you currently part of? (Select all that apply)
options: None of the above / not sure

title:
4.2 请描述 1–3 个你经常参与的组织 / 社区，你在其中通常做的事情（可以是具体任务或你常参与的部分）以及担任的职位（如果有的话）。
Please describe 1–3 organizations or communities you are regularly involved in, and what you usually do in each (specific tasks or activities are welcome).

4.3 你觉得以下哪些资源是“你现在就能用得上的”？（可多选）
Which resources do you think you could realistically leverage? (Select all that apply)
options: A club / organization you’re active in
A platform (school newspaper, website, social media, etc.)
A Physical space (farm, lab, kitchen, studio, etc.)

title: Section 5｜Project Initial Thinking（初步想法，不要求成熟）

5.1 你是否想过做一个属于你自己的 project / initiative？
Have you ever thought about starting your own project or initiative?
options: I’ve thought about it, but not clearly

title:
5.2 如果有，你目前最模糊的想法是？（可以很不成熟，很多学生都是从没有明确想法开始的）
If yes, briefly describe your rough idea (it doesn’t have to be polished—many students start without one).
Section 6｜Time & Commitment（现实约束）

6.1 你在学期中每周大概可以投入多少时间？
During the school term, approximately how much time can you commit per week?

6.2 你更偏好哪种节奏？
Which type of working pace do you usually prefer?
What is your parent or guardian's full name?
What is your parent or guardian's email address?
